match: how do i configure an api key
questions.answer: Open Settings → Developer, then click Generate API key. Copy the key immediately — Acme shows it only once, so store it in your secrets manager before leaving the page.

steps.text: In the left sidebar, open Settings and select the Developer tab. This is where workspace-level API access is managed.
Under API Keys, click Generate API key. Copy the key from the dialog right away — it is displayed only once.

match: how do i invite a team member
questions.answer: Go to Team → Members and click Invite member. Enter the person's email, choose their role, and send the invitation — they'll get an email link to join the workspace.

steps.text: Open Team in the sidebar and go to the Members list, then click Invite member.
Enter the teammate's email address, pick a role (Admin, Member, or Viewer), and click Send invitation.

match: how do i issue a refund
questions.answer: Open Billing → Transactions, select the charge you want to reverse, and click Refund this charge. The amount returns to the customer's original payment method.

steps.text: Go to Billing → Transactions and open the transaction for the charge you need to refund.
Click Refund this charge and confirm. The refund is returned to the original payment method.

fallback.answer: This is the Stepwise demo — it only answers three canned questions with pre-baked data. Try one of the sample questions: “How do I configure an API key?”, “How do I invite a team member?”, or “How do I issue a refund?” To ask anything about your own videos, run the full app with an Anthropic API key.
